title: Tensura: Virtuoso
description: A small addon adding a few skills to the Tensura: Reincarnated mod
body:
An addon for Tensura: Reincarnated, that so far adds 1 race, 3 uniques, and an ultimate for healer.

Traitor Increases Existence point gain and imprisons targets, as well as inflicting burden.

Saviour also increase existence point gain, but it turns majin into non-majin.

Punisher imprisons targets, adds anti-skill to some attacks, and deals massive damage
